response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of experience, but their profile is heavily weighted toward web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than the deep, current C++ expertise this role requires. Their only professional C++ experience was a short stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015. They show relevant systems fundamentals — low-latency asynchronous services, event-driven architecture, multi-threading concepts via DLang — but lack the required C++/STL depth, MQTT/IoT protocol work, and any exposure to SDL or IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity standards central to this position.
strengths: Deep systems experience with low-latency, high-throughput services (millions of requests/sec) using async I/O and caching
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
Event-driven platform architecture experience (GISCollective) with Kubernetes deployment
concerns: Professional C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months in 2014–2015)
No industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus), or IEC 62443 / SDL security background
Career trajectory centers on web/full-stack and D language, not the C++/STL and message-broker stack required

key_factors.factor: Insufficient C++ depth for a senior C++ role
Strong general systems and concurrency fundamentals
